title: Polymorph Data Language
summary: Polymorph Data Language is my own alternative to JSON, YAML, XML, CSV etc. It has most of their features + several new features combined into a single data language - having all the features I have alwways wanted a data language to have.
content: Polymorph Data Language is my own alternative to JSON, YAML, XML, CSV etc. It has most of their features + several new features combined into a single data language - having all the features I have alwways wanted a data language to have.
